hooks.command: powershell -Command "Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; \$n = New-Object System.Windows.Forms.NotifyIcon; \$n.Icon = [System.Drawing.SystemIcons]::Information; \$n.BalloonTipTitle = 'Claude Code'; \$n.BalloonTipText = '任务已完成'; \$n.Visible = \$true; \$n.ShowBalloonTip(5000); [System.Media.SystemSounds]::Asterisk.Play(); Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; \$n.Dispose()"
